name: Kids' Round Shelf with Gold Wire - Pillowfort™
description: Save space while helping decorate your kid's space with the Round Shelf with Gold Wire from Pillowfort™. This white wall shelf is designed in a round shape with gold-tone wire around the circumference for appealing contrast and easy pairing with their existing decor. Designed with a metal frame, it features two shelves to offer ample space for plants, books and other decorative items.
